name: shodh-memory
desc: Local, LLM-free memory for AI agents. A single offline Rust binary — deterministic and auditable — that learns from use, forgets the irrelevant, and strengthen…
descFull: Local, LLM-free memory for AI agents. A single offline Rust binary — deterministic and auditable — that learns from use, forgets the irrelevant, and strengthens what matters. No cloud, no API keys.
